compiled_state.title: [af9e-77fc] RED: Write strict verification test — zero .sh code-line refs, no bypass
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to do
Create tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh — verification test that asserts absolute zero plugins/dso references in non-comment .sh code lines. NO grep -v bypass, NO annotation exclusion.

## Test content
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Test: absolute zero plugins/dso refs in non-comment code lines under plugins/dso/
MATCHES=$(grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/ --include="*.sh" | grep -v "^[^:]*:[^:]*:#")
if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: Found plugins/dso references in code lines:"
  echo "$MATCHES"
  exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: Zero plugins/dso refs in code lines"
```

Also fix S1 verification test: remove the grep -v plugin-self-ref-ok bypass from tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh.

## Files to create/modify
- tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh (CREATE, chmod +x)
- tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh (MODIFY: remove grep -v plugin-self-ref-ok bypass)
- .test-index (ADD mappings for new test)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh
- [ ] Verification test has NO grep -v bypass for any annotation tag
  Verify: ! grep -q "grep -v" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh
- [ ] S1 test has NO grep -v plugin-self-ref-ok bypass
  Verify: ! grep -q "plugin-self-ref-ok" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh
- [ ] Verification test FAILS (RED) before migration
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] .test-index updated
  Verify: grep "test-no-plugin-runtime-refs" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
